questions.question: Starting from the blue ball hopper with the solved board configuration, describe the path of the first blue ball.
questions.answer: The first blue ball drops from (2,-1), rolls onto the first ramp at (1,4), then the second ramp at (2,2), landing on the central bit (bit 3) which directs it to bit 2 at (2,3), flipping bit 2 to the right.

questions.question: What happens to bits 2 and 5 after all 5 blue balls have been released?
questions.answer: Both bits 2 and 5 end up pointing to the right.

questions.question: How does the central bit (bit 3) distribute the blue balls to reach different targets?
questions.answer: The central bit acts as a splitter - balls hitting the left side of the bit roll left toward bit 2, while balls hitting the right side roll right toward bit 5.
